action_boundary: Should settlement instruction SET-5 be released with the stated variance?
communication_boundary: A visible variance is not enough. Compare the variance to the written tolerance record.

documents.text: Settlement instruction SET-5 requests release after conversion.
Calculation record CALC-5 shows a USD 0.58 variance between the bank quote and worksheet.
Tolerance memo TOL-5 permits variance up to USD 1.00 for this settlement class.
Treasury approval APP-5 binds SET-5, CALC-5, and TOL-5.
Settlement release requires approval and any variance to be inside the written tolerance memo.
